title: Tabletop rehearsal evidence — IR plan exercise frequency
exclusions: Does NOT evaluate the quality of the exercise (facilitator notes are outside scope).
evidence: Saved search 'ir_tabletop_frequency' (monthly) emits IR playbooks whose last rehearsal exceeds cadence.

compliance.assurance_rationale: NIS2 incident handling includes regular testing of the IR plan.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Playbook PB-007 has not been rehearsed in 200 days (cadence: 180 days); the UC fires.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Playbook rehearsed within 180 days; no alert.

dataSources: IR playbook register, rehearsal signed attestations.
spl:
| inputlookup ir_playbooks.csv
| lookup ir_rehearsals.csv playbook_id OUTPUT last_rehearsal signed_by
| eval days_since=round((now()-strptime(last_rehearsal,"%Y-%m-%d"))/86400,0)
| where isnull(last_rehearsal) OR days_since>cadence_days
| table playbook_id owner last_rehearsal days_since cadence_days
description: Tracks IR playbook rehearsal frequency per playbook, against per-playbook cadence. Tabletop exercises are the single most-cited IR control in supervisory reviews.
value: Shifts IR readiness evidence from 'we rehearse' to 'here is the per-playbook cadence record'.
implementation: (1) Maintain ir_playbooks.csv with cadence; (2) emit rehearsal completion records; (3) run monthly.
visualization: Heatmap of playbook × days-since-rehearsal, single-value '% of playbooks within cadence'.
knownFalsePositives: Newly-authored playbooks need an onboarding grace window.
